name: spearhead
description: Marketplace for the Spearhead plugin: gated problem-attack workflow with isolated task worktrees and independent verification

plugins.name: spearhead
plugins.description: Gated problem-attack workflow: understand, recon, design, plan, execute, verify, ship, retro. Hard gates between phases, file-based state mutated only through a validating CLI, per-task git worktrees for isolated parallel execution, and independent verification so nothing self-certifies.
